prerequisites.value: Improved Unarmed Strike, Knowledge (arcana) 6 ranks, Knowledge (dungeoneering, local, nature, planes, or religion) 1 rank.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using this style, you can spend a swift action to make a Knowledge check to identify a single creature (DC 15 + the creatureâs CR for this purpose). If you succeed at the check, while using this style, you gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against that creatureâs attacks, as well as a +2 dodge bonus to AC against that creatureâs attacks of opportunity. These bonuses last for as long as you use this style. If you cease combat with the creature during this time and resume it later, you can attempt the check again.
